title: Cozy Jasmine Umami Rice
description: This Mediterranean-friendly dish features a medley of aromatic spices and herbs to create a flaky, cozy base for your rice, complemented with umami-rich elements that enhance its depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: 2 cups water
ingredients.notes: Measure by volume or weight as needed for cooking

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: For sautéing and flavoring the rice

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon ground cumin
ingredients.notes: Add a touch of smokiness to the rice

ingredients.name: 1/2 teaspoon smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: Provides a mild smokiness that complements the dish well

ingredients.name: Pinch of salt
ingredients.notes: Enhances natural flavors without overpowering them

ingredients.name: Pinch of black pepper
ingredients.notes: Adds a slight kick to balance out the spices

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Garnish and add freshness to the dish

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup finely chopped red onion
ingredients.notes: Adds a touch of sweetness and depth

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons lemon juice
ingredients.notes: Brightens up the overall flavor profile

instructions: Rinse the jasmine rice in cold water until the water runs clear.
Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute.
Stir in cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Cook for another minute to let the spices infuse into the pan.
Add rice and stir well with the aromatic mixture until it's evenly coated. Pour in water and bring to a boil.
Once boiling, reduce heat to low and cover the saucepan. Let it simmer for 18-20 minutes or until all the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender but not mushy.
Remove from heat, add lemon juice and mix well, then let it sit covered for about 5 more minutes. Season with freshly ground black pepper if needed.
Garnish with chopped parsley and red onion before serving.
